ddls:
CREATE TABLE "electric_vehicle_sales" (
  "ev_sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electric vehicle sales record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of electric vehicle sales */,
  "ev_sales" INTEGER /* Number of electric vehicle sales */,
  "phev_sales" INTEGER /* Number of plug-in hybrid electric vehicle sales */,
  "tot_prod" INTEGER /* Total production of vehicles */,
  "tot_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales of vehicles */,
  "avg_battery_range" REAL /* Average battery range of electric vehicles */,
  "avg_battery_capacity" REAL /* Average battery capacity of electric vehicles */,
  "fast_charging_infra" INTEGER /* Number of fast-charging infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ev_sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electric_vehicle_sales_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES renewable_energy ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electric_vehicle_sales_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES gdp ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electric_vehicle_sales_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES emissions ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electric_vehicle_sales_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES gas_prices ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of emissions data */,
  "total_emission" REAL /* Total emissions */,
  "transportation_emission" REAL /* Transportation-related emissions */,
  "motor_emission" REAL /* Motor-related emissions */,
  "industry_emission" REAL /* Industry-related emissions */,
  "energy_emission" REAL /* Energy-related emissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewable_energy" (
  "renewable_energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewable energy record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of renewable energy data */,
  "tot_ren_energy" REAL /* Total renewable energy production */,
  "solar_energy" REAL /* Solar energy production */,
  "wind_energy" REAL /* Wind energy production */,
  "hydro_energy" REAL /* Hydro energy production */,
  "geothermal_energy" REAL /* Geothermal energy production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewable_energy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of GDP data */,
  "gdp_usd" REAL /* GDP in USD */,
  "gdp_growth_annual" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_prices" (
  "gas_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas price record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of gas price data */,
  "gasprice_per_gal" REAL /* Gas price per gallon */,
  "inflated_gasprice_gal" REAL /* Inflated gas price per gallon */,
  "diesel_price_per_gal" REAL /* Diesel price per gallon */,
  "avg_fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Average fuel efficiency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gas_price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" TEXT /* Data downloaded by the user */,
  "dashboard_viewed" TEXT /* Dashboard viewed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard that the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table, map) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the data */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was downloaded */,
  "data_downloaded" TEXT /* Data that was downloaded */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the downloaded data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
